title: 2024.12.16How do I store inventory data in my Stripe applicationSummary:Explore the critical importance of managing real-time inventory updates for both online marketplaces and physical stores. This blog post details the development of an event-driven architecture designed to synchronize inventory levels with Stripe payment events using AWS cloud services.
